overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character walking through a futuristic London city street at night. The character passes under overpasses, walks past modern glass buildings, a red double-decker bus, and ends at a large illuminated wireframe horse sculpture in a protest camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under railway overpass with graffiti

events.description: exits covered area under overpass into open street with modern buildings
red double-decker bus approaches and passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, emerging from under the graffiti-covered railway overpass

notable_agents.action: red double-decker bus driving along the street and passing the character

entered.detail: concrete railway overpass with colorful graffiti tags and street art on the walls
tall curved modern building with reflective glass facade and horizontal white lines
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a graffiti-covered railway overpass and walks out onto a city street at night. A modern glass tower rises on the right while a classic red double-decker bus passes by on the left. The street is lit by overhead lamps and the scene has a cool, artificial lighting typical of urban nightlife.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with hotel entrance and digital signage

events.description: approaching the Prime Way Hotel entrance with illuminated signage and purple digital billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the modern glass building, approaching the hotel entrance with neon accents

entered.detail: building entrance with illuminated 'PRIME WAY Hotel' signage and purple neon lighting accents
tall vertical digital screen displaying vibrant purple and pink abstract graphics
massive concrete support pillars and underside of the overpass structure ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open street, passing the modern glass tower on the right. The Prime Way Hotel entrance comes into view with its illuminated signage and a large purple digital billboard. The character approaches and begins to pass under another concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with wooden construction fence

events.description: passes under the concrete overpass into a more enclosed, sheltered area
police van with flashing blue lights visible parked across the street

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, passing the hotel entrance and continuing along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: police van with yellow and blue checkered markings and flashing lights parked across the street

entered.detail: wooden construction fence covered with various posters and advertisements
wall section covered with colorful protest posters and graffiti art
small landscaped grassy area with trees behind the wooden fence
black public trash bin on the sidewalk near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the concrete overpass, moving through a more enclosed space with the Prime Way Hotel entrance now behind. A police van is visible across the street. On the right, a wooden construction fence covered in posters runs parallel to the sidewalk, with a grassy area and trees beyond it.

scene_state.functional_zone: protest camp with red tents and illuminated sculpture

events.description: enters protest camp area with red tents and banners reading 'RESIST THE TECH'
large illuminated wireframe horse sculpture becomes visible ahead, glowing white and orange

agents.ego_description: walking through the protest camp area, approaching the large illuminated sculpture with curiosity

notable_agents.action: protester in red jacket standing near the camp entrance

entered.detail: red and white striped protest tents with banners reading 'RESIST THE TECH' and 'RISE UP'
metal barrel with fire burning inside, providing warmth and light
large illuminated wireframe sculpture of a horse with rider, glowing white and orange
tall modern building with illuminated windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open area occupied by a protest camp with red tents and banners reading 'RESIST THE TECH'. A burning barrel provides warm light. Dominating the scene ahead is a massive illuminated wireframe sculpture of a horse with a rider, glowing brightly against the night sky. Pedestrians walk through the camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with large illuminated art installation

events.description: character slows and looks up at the wireframe horse sculpture, circling around its base
sculpture lighting shifts from white to warm orange glow as character views it from below

agents.ego_description: circling the base of the sculpture and looking up at the illuminated wireframe horse and rider, examining the art installation

entered.detail: tall dark office building with minimal lighting visible behind the sculpture
trees with autumn-colored leaves surrounding the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive wireframe horse sculpture, walking around its base and looking up in awe. The sculpture towers overhead, its geometric wireframe structure illuminated in shifting white and orange light. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the art installation against the dark night sky, with autumn trees and buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic London street at night, transitioning from a cold urban corridor into a vibrant, illuminated protest camp. It begins under a graffiti-covered railway overpass, moving past a modern glass tower and a passing red double-decker bus under cool artificial lighting. As the character advances, the scene opens up to reveal the illuminated signage and purple digital billboard of the Prime Way Hotel before shifting back into the enclosure of another concrete overpass. The camera then emerges from this structure, passing a police van and a poster-covered construction fence to enter an open area filled with red tents, banners, and the warm glow of a burning barrel. Finally, the movement culminates at a massive, glowing wireframe sculpture of a horse and rider, with the camera tilting upward to emphasize the towering geometric installation against the dark night sky.
